dictPanel.noResultsDesc: Search results will appear here when you look up a word.
dictPanel.noDictsEnabledDesc: Enable at least one dictionary in settings to start searching.

commonSettings.title: Common Settings
commonSettings.subtitle: Configure extension basics and preferences
commonSettings.translatorOutputLangDesc: Set the target output language for all translator modules (Google, Caiyun, DeepLx, etc.).
commonSettings.uiLanguageDesc: Set the display language for the extension UI.
commonSettings.themeColorDesc: Set the seed color for generating the extension's color scheme.
commonSettings.chromaToneDesc: Fine-tune the chroma (saturation) and tone (lightness) of the source color used for theme generation.
commonSettings.backupRestoreDesc: Export all current settings to a JSON file, or import a JSON file to replace the existing settings.
commonSettings.exportSuccess: Settings were exported to a JSON file.
commonSettings.exportError: Failed to export settings. Please try again.
commonSettings.importSuccess: Settings were imported and restored successfully.
commonSettings.importConfirm: Importing will overwrite all current settings. Continue?
commonSettings.autoPlayAudioDesc: Automatically speak the search term using TTS after each lookup.
commonSettings.ttsProviderDesc: Select the text-to-speech engine used for auto pronunciation.
commonSettings.autoSearchDesc: Automatically look up words when text is selected, without clicking the popup icon.

fontSettings.title: Custom Font
fontSettings.fontFamilyDesc: Select a preset or enter a Google Fonts font name.
fontSettings.cdnProviderDesc: Users in mainland China can switch to the SJTU mirror for faster loading.
fontSettings.previewText: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. 中文字体预览。日本語フォントプレビュー。

dictSettings.title: Dictionary Management
dictSettings.displayOrderDesc: Drag to reorder dictionaries in the panel

longman.noEntries: Unable to find matching entries on Longman.

caiyunConfig.tokenHelp: You can apply at <0>Caiyun Open Platform</0>.

deeplxConfig.defaultEndpointDesc: DeepLx service address, default is https://api.deeplx.org
deeplxConfig.accessTokenDesc: The access token (Bearer Token) set when deploying DeepLx.

wiktionaryConfig.displayLanguageDesc: Select the content language version for Wiktionary.

omwConfig.langDesc: The language used for word lookup. 'Auto-detect' will determine the language from input text.
omwConfig.lang2Desc: The fallback language for definitions and translations when the primary language has no data.
omwConfig.maxSynsetsDesc: Maximum number of word senses (synsets) to fetch and display per search.

engineError.deeplxApiKeyMissing: Please fill in the DeepLx API Key in settings.
engineError.openaiApiKeyMissing: API Key cannot be empty. Please fill it in settings.
engineError.jishoUnexpectedStructure: Unexpected HTML structure: missing #primary or #secondary elements

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary Book
vocabulary.subtitle: Manage your saved words
vocabulary.emptyDesc: Click the bookmark icon on dictionary results to save words here.
vocabulary.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this word?
vocabulary.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all saved words? This cannot be undone.
